details: Paper (Molecules 2026, 31, 844) Section 3.1.5 compound 5c: 'Synthesis of 4-fluoro-5-(4-ethylpiperazin-1-yl) benzene-1,2-diamine (5c)... Solid cream crystals... M.P.: 94-96 C'. Name, value (94-96 = 95.0), property (mp), DOI all match.

Paper (RSC Adv 2026, 16, 19903): 'BISDA as a brown microcrystalline powder (0.493 g, yield 83%). Mp > 300 C (decomposes without melting)'. Per disambiguation 'decomp.' -> decomposition property is correct. Name (BISDA = full IUPAC), value, relation '>', DOI match.

Paper (Molecules 2001, 6, 300) compound 9 is named '3(N)-(2,2'-diaminobenzophenone)-5-hydroxy-1,4-naphthoquinone' (TWO amino groups, 2,2'-diamino). CSV name says '3-(2-aminobenzophenone)-5-hydroxy-1,4-naphthoquinone' (ONE amino, missing 2,2'-di prefix). Value 221 C and rest of evidence match the paper, but compound identity is misnamed in the CSV.

details: Paper (Molecules 2001, 6, 267) experimental compound 3b: '3-Amino-2-(1`(4-methylphenylsulphonyl)-1`-(phenyl)methyl]quinazolin-4(3H)-one (3b).- Colourless crystals (65%), m.p. 135 C'.
